folio.label: 121r
folio.l: As dotú an Egle , whan hi~ list to sore
This same Steede , shal bere ©ow euäemore
Witú outen harm , til ©e be there ©ow list
Thougú that ©e slepen , on his bak , & rest
And tåne a geyn , witú writhyngö of a pyn
He that it wrougút , he coude many a gyn
He wayted many , a constellaciou~
Or he had don , this operaciouö
And knew ful many , a sel , & many a bonde
¢ This Mirour eke , that I haue in myn honde
Hatú swicú a mygút , that men moun in it se
Whan there shal fallen , any aduäsitee
Vn to ©oure regne , or to ©oure self also
And openly , who is ©oure frend or foo
And ouä al this , if any lady brigút
Hatú set hire herte , on any manä wygút
If he be fals , she shal his tresou~ see
His newe loue , and al his subtilitee
So openly , there shal no thyngö hyde
Wherfore , a geyns this lusty somäes tyde
This Myrour & this Ryngö , that ©e may se
He hatú sent , to my lady Canacee
ñoure excellente dougúter , that is here
The vertu of the Ryngö , if ©e wiln~ heere
Is this , that if hire list , it , for to were
Vp on hire thombe , or in hire purs it bere
There nys no foule , that flietú vnder the heuene
That she ne shal wel , vnderstonde his steuene
And knowe his menyngö , openly and pleyn
And answere hi~ , in his langage ageyn
And euäy gras , that growetú vp on rote
She shal eke knowe , & whom it wol do bote
Al ben hise woundes , neuäe so depe & wyde
¢ This naked swerd , that hangetú be my syde
Swicú vertu hatú , that what man æ ©e smyte
Thurgú out his armure , it wyl kerue & byte
Were it as thikke , as is a braunched ook
And what man æ is wounded , witú the strok
Shal neuäe be hol , til that ©ow list of grace
To stroke hi~ witú the plat , in thilke place
There he is hurt , this is so meche to seyn
ñe mote witú the plat swerd , a geyn
Stroke hi~ in the wounde , and it wol close
This is a verray sotú , witú outen glose
